content.en:
"A thousand pieces of cold gold from the other side are all together, and you can trade with the Lord of the Cold Star!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Although the auction of the Lord of the Cold Star was over, he didn't trade with anyone, so he naturally had a chance.

Subsequently.

He hurried to the Xuanyin Giant City in the middle.

After some time, he merged with the replica body of Xuanyin Giant City and handed over a thousand pieces of cold gold from the other side to the replica body.

......

"The Lord of the Cold Stars, the Lord of the Endless, has come to visit and wants to make a deal with the Lord of the Cold Stars. "

Ye Tian came to the residence of the Lord of the Cold Star in Xuanyin Giant City and shouted.

"Trade what?"

The Lord of the Cold Stars didn't appear, only a voice came out.

"I trade the Ancestral Tree Fruit of the Lord of the Cold Star for the Cold Gold of the Other Side!"

Ye Tian spoke.

Wow!

The Lord of the Cold Star appeared, looked at Ye Tian, and was a little suspicious: "How many pieces of cold gold do you have?" Without a thousand pieces of cold gold, it is impossible for me to trade the ancestral tree fruit of the other side, I can trade it with other treasures." "

Ye Tian looked around and said, "Can you talk in detail after you go in?"

"Good!"

The Lord of the Cold Star invited Ye Tian over.

After entering the residence of the Lord of the Cold Star, Ye Tian took out a thousand pieces of cold gold from the other side.

"It's really the cold gold on the other side!"

The Lord of the Cold Stars was excited.

A thousand pieces of cold gold from the other side, he couldn't collect it himself, but Ye Tian actually had it.

He was very curious about where Ye Tian got the cold gold from the other side.

However, he did not ask.

"Lord of Endless, are you going to trade this thousand pieces of cold gold for my Ancestral Tree Fruit?" asked the Lord of the Cold Star.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, the two completed the transaction.

The Lord of the Cold Star didn't do anything to kill people and sell goods, after all, this is the Xuanyin Giant City, and it is still easy to be discovered by doing this kind of thing.

Besides, he didn't lack an ancestral tree fruit on the other side, so he couldn't do this kind of thing.

...

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian was in a good mood.

The Origin Ancestral Beast has a bone containing the origin, plus the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side, after he goes back, the rules of the Origin on the other side will definitely improve greatly, and the Origin on the other side will definitely easily break through to 2 million.

When the time comes, he can go to the Origin Ascending Realm.

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian traded some more items and treasures, and this trade fair was about to end.

A palace in the Xuanyin Giant City.

There is a special trade that takes place here, and it is a trade that only the Origin Ascendant is qualified to enter.

"This time, a total of thirteen Origin Ancestral Orders have been released, everyone can bid!"

Subsequently, one of the origins began to bid.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth was also here, but he only bid a few times before giving up, and any Origin Ancestral Order was not something he could bid for, and he could only watch the excitement.

Ultimately.

These thirteen Origin Ancestral Orders were auctioned off by the thirteen top Origin Upper Realms.

And after the end of this auction, it also means that the trade fair of Xuanyin Big City is over.

From beginning to end, Ye Tian didn't know about this trade fair.

......

"Go back!"

Ye Tian followed the Lord of the Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice and Rain to return to the Wind Tooth Island.

Upon his return, he immediately declared a retreat.

Afterwards.

He first refined the Nine Realms True Source Fruit, and the Nine Realms True Source Fruit could improve the Origin Realm Will, which could increase his Origin Realm Will to more than 1 million, which would also help improve his strength.

The years passed.

The Nine Realms True Source Fruit was gradually refined by Ye Tian, causing his Origin Realm will to skyrocket.

After testing, his Origin Realm will had reached the level of 1.1 million.

Afterwards.

He used the Origin Beast Skeleton.

In the Eternal Ruins Divine Array.

Ye Tian began to use this Origin Ancestral Beast Skeleton to comprehend the internal origin, so as to comprehend the origin rules on the other side.

His other side origin rule realm has reached ninety percent one, and this time using this source ancestral beast bone, he can definitely raise the other side origin rule to ninety percent and two realms.

Even, he had the hope of raising the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the ninety-three-level realm in one go.

After all, he has many other level ancestral endowments, and the speed at which he comprehends the rules of the Origin on the other side is far greater than that of other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors!

Other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors may only be able to use this Origin Ancestor Beast Skeleton to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Side to the Ninety Percent Two Realm, but he can most likely be able to raise it to the Ninety Percent Three Realm.

"Cultivate!"

Ye Tian silently comprehended, and the years passed slowly.

About 30,000 years have passed, and he has successfully raised the origin rules of the other side to the ninety-two-level realm with the help of this Origin Beast bone.

With the breakthrough of the rules of the other side's origin, his other's origin naturally skyrocketed.

"The origin in the bones of the Origin Ancestor Beast has not been consumed yet, there are still a lot, continue to comprehend!"

Ye Tian strove to use this Origin Ancestral Beast Skeleton to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the Ninety Percent Three Realm.

In this way, another 100,000 primeval years have passed.

this day.

This cut of the origin ancestral beast bones finally exhausted the origin, and at the last moment, he finally raised the origin rules of the other side to the ninety out of three realm.

......

Fengya Island, the origin monument on the other side.

Ye Tian came here to test it.

2.05 million

Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, after reaching the 2 million Origin of the Other Shore, if you want to improve the Origin of the Other Shore, many resources are useless.

But.

If he raised the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the ninety percent and four realms, the Origin of the Other Shore would still be improved by a cut.

When the time comes, when he breaks through to the Origin Upper Realm, not only will the success rate increase a little, but the magnitude of the other side's Origin will also increase.

"I still have an Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side, I can eat it, and there should be hope to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Side to the realm of ninety percent and four!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He continued to retreat, refining the ancestral fruit on the other side.

The energy contained in the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side is too terrifying, and the auxiliary comprehension effect on the Origin Rules of the other side is also very high.

For the long years that followed, he had been comprehending the rules of the Origin on the other side.

50,000 primeval eras!

100,000 primeval eras!

150,000 primeval era!

Finally, in the 180,000th primeval era, Ye Tiancai used this ancestral tree fruit on the other side to raise the origin rules of the other side to the ninety percent four realm.

Afterwards.

He tested his other side of the origin, and it had reached the level of 2.3 million.

And.

The physical body is extreme, the other side of the origin rules are ninety percent of the realm, the other side of the origin is 2.3 million, the will of the origin realm reaches 1.1 million, and a number of top other side supreme techniques have also been created.

It can be said that Ye Tian has reached the true extreme in the Origin Middle Realm.

He was about to storm the Origin Upper Realm on Wind Tooth Island, so he informed the Lord of Ice and Rain of the news.

For the first time, the Lord of the Wind Fang and the Lord of the Ice Rain came to find Ye Tian.
